hero.title: Download Videos
hero.subtitle: Paste a link from TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, or Pinterest. Your video downloads in seconds, clean, fast, and completely free.

about.desc: Clipzy is a fast, browser-based video downloader. Paste any link and your video is ready in seconds, no software, no account, no watermark. All processing happens on our servers so it works on any device including iPhone, Android, PC and Mac.
about.kf1: No watermark, download videos from TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, and Pinterest without any logo overlay.
about.kf2: Works on any device: iPhone, Android, Windows, Mac, or tablet.
about.kf3: 100% browser-based, nothing to install or sign up for.
about.kf4: Always free. A small number of ads help keep the service running.
about.kf5: Supports TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, and Pinterest, with more platforms on the way.

features.title: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't

free.title: Always Free
free.desc: No subscriptions, no paywalls, no hidden fees. Clipzy is free to use and always will be.

noAccount.title: No Account

hdQuality.title: HD Quality

q1.q: How do I download TikTok videos without a watermark?
q1.a: Open TikTok and find the video. Tap Share, then Copy Link. Paste the link into Clipzy above, click Download, and save the clean watermark-free video to your device.

q2.q: How do I get the TikTok video link?
q2.a: Open the TikTok app, find your video, tap the Share icon, and choose Copy Link. The URL is now on your clipboard, paste it into the field above and hit Download.

q3.q: Where are downloaded videos saved on my device?
q3.a: Your browser saves videos to its default downloads folder. On mobile, files usually appear in your Photos or Downloads app depending on your device and browser settings.

q4.q: Does Clipzy store a copy of my downloaded videos?
q4.a: No. Clipzy processes each request on-the-fly and delivers the file directly to your device. We do not store, cache, or retain any copy of the videos you download.

q5.q: Do I need to install anything or create an account?
q5.a: No. Clipzy is entirely browser-based. No extensions, no apps, no account required, just paste the link and download.

q6.a: Yes, completely free. We display a small number of ads to keep the service running. No subscriptions, no hidden fees, no limits.

footer.tagline: Free video downloader, no watermark, no signup, no fuss.
